title: Modded Fun
description: A modpack created to relive MC 1.20 with minimal vanilla + mods that just enhance the experience. When all the mods in this pack would be updated to the future versions of MC, this pack will also be updated.
body:
# Welcome to Modded Fun: Alpha Edition !

Where classic Minecraft meets a touch of exciting new additions! Designed for Minecraft 1.20 and built with the Fabric loader, this modpack is crafted for players who love the vanilla experience but are eager to explore a few carefully chosen improvements.

In this alpha release, Modded Fun offers a delightful blend of mods that enhance your gameplay while staying true to the essence of Minecraft. Expect to find connected textures, optimizations, quality-of-life tweaks, and new features that integrate seamlessly with the vanilla game, making each adventure feel fresh yet familiar.

# Features

-   **Visual Effects in Caves:** Discover new and immersive visual effects that make exploring caves more thrilling.
-   **Audio Upgrades:** Enhanced audio experience with richer soundscapes and improved environmental sounds.
-   **Enhanced Explosions:** Enjoy more dynamic and impactful explosions that add excitement to your encounters.
-   **Out Voted Mobs:** Added mobs that haven't been chosen by the community to add diversity and challenge.
-   **Model Fixes:** Updated models for a more polished and consistent look.
-   **Better Shields:** Improved shield mechanics for a more satisfying defensive experience.
-   **Better Nametags:** A much better way to name nametags.
-   **Classic Modded Zoom:** A traditional zoom feature for better exploration and strategic gameplay.

---

Join us in this alpha phase and be part of the journey as we refine and expand Modded Fun. Your feedback will help shape the future of this modpack. Enjoy the enhanced experience and thank you for contributing to the adventure!
